channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Multiple potholes on Parabola Rd, both lanes around CLC, Sidney Lodge, 7th March
item.description:
Multiples potholes along a large stretch of Parabola Road, in particular around Sidney Lodge, a CLC boarding house. Drivers have to keep an eye on the road surface and weave in and out across both lanes to avoid hitting a pothole. This is creating a hazard, which is amplified by the fact that students from CLC are often crossing there too. Needs urgent attention before an accident happens.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Parabola Road, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 7th March
item.description:
A large bag of general waste has been flytipped along Barnet Way just before the entrance to the EDF site. It is behind lamp post SO41 22 on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnett Way, Barnwood, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Large pothole at bottom of Warren Close, 7th March
item.description:
Large pothole at bottom of Warren Close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Warren Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole spanning a third of lane, previous recent repair failed, 7th March
item.description:
Opposite laundry, Hatherley Road, GL51 6HF. Pothole is very wide and deep, causing traffic to brake hard to avoid. Drivers are also driving into the opposite lane to avoid the pothole, which in itself is a safety hazard. Noticed that many potholes on Hatherley Road have now been marked with white paint....this one has not been marked!! Needs immediate attention.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 217, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, disintegrated after recent repair: opp laundry, 7th March
item.description:
O/S 219 Hatherley Road, GL51 6HF
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 217, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More than one pothole outside my house, 7th March
item.description:
There are many potholes outside my home of 2A Fairhaven Avenue Brockworth and outside my drive They have been there since Christmas and have gradually got worse. Cars that go past my home scatter stones everywhere. I am concerned there will be damage to my home or car which is kept on the drive

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Fairhaven Avenue, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover . Near County Kitchen & Bathrooms and the Church on the main Tewkesbury Road Cheltenham, 7th March
item.description:
Manhole cover very loose near County kitchens & Bathrooms and the Church Tewkesbury Road . Been doing it for at least a couple of weeks .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75-83, Tewkesbury Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant debris and mulch build up all along road, 7th March
item.description:
There is a significant build up of debris and mulch around the curbs all along this road following a long gap in street cleaning. This is particularly slippy underfoot. Area around the bus stop here in the direction of the town centre is particularly bad, especially around an abandoned vehicle which has been stationary for a very long time and has been stickered with an ‘enviro crime’ sign.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 69, Prestbury Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight out - also reported a second on Selkirk gardens. Multiple in a row are out making the area very dark and unsafe at night. Appears to be a frequent issue with the same street lights even after the have been marked as fixed they fail again within a few months, 7th March
item.description:
Pitville Circus Road just off the roundabout near All saints Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pittville Circus Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tredington roadworks 7pm-7am, 6th March
item.description:
The contractors are putting up road closed signs way earlier than the advertised closure times of 7pm to 7am. The signs were up today at 2:45 pm and yesterday at 4:45pm. I have gone through as have several,others and the contractors are then parked right on a bend making it hazardous for vehicles to pass. The road should not be closed at this time and I hope this doesn’t happen next week during race week or it will be chaos.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Road, Stoke Orchard, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Information board identifying emergency contact company/number not displayed

item.title: 15+ inch pothole, junction of the Reddings, 6th March
item.description:
(51.8861448, -2.1427340) Wide and deep pothole directly in left wheel line. Just before The Reddings junction, next to a tree There was already a job raise for this and was close due to not being dangerous… this pothole is dangerously deep and wide

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep pothole, gave me a flat tyre on Wednesday whilst I was only going 4mph., 6th March
item.description:
The edge of the road, where it meets the roundabout. Closest building is Gloucestershire Police Depot, what 3 words location: ///agents.blaze.soils .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Golden Valley Junction, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole. Caused damage to the front passenger tyre, 6th March
item.description:
Driving to cricley hill/air balloon direction from Cheltenham. Just before the lay-by opposite viewing point. Massive pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Hill, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs and road markings completely the wrong way around, 6th March
item.description:
When heading into Cheltenham from Smiths traffic lights, where two lanes merge into just one, the new signage and road markings direct traffic into the left hand lane, which is the lane that does not continue. Anyone following this instruction will immediately have to move out into the right lane! How on earth this wasn’t noticed by the sign writers is a mystery!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Pothole keeps on reoccurring., 6th March
item.description:
Mill lane. Junction with vicarage lane. Brockworth.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Vicarage Lane, Brockworth, Gloucester
